// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable

namespace TestNs
{
    partial class MyControl
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Defines the <see cref="Width"/> property.
        /// </summary>
        public static readonly global::Avalonia.StyledProperty<int> WidthProperty =
            global::Avalonia.AvaloniaProperty.Register<global::TestNs.MyControl, int>(nameof(Width), defaultValue: 100);

        public partial int Width
        {
            get => GetValue(WidthProperty);
            set => SetValue(WidthProperty, value);
        }
    }
}
